texto: My husband's a little younger than me. When I first started dating him, I just fell mad for him. I made a deal with myself: I was like, 'I'm not gonna get weird about what the future might be. I'm just going to be in every moment I can and enjoy us to the fullest.' I told him that, too.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Joelle Carter: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “My husband's a little younger than me. When I first started dating him, I just fell mad for him. …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, future, myself pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de myself e me.

frase_original: My husband's a little younger than me. When I first started dating him, I just fell mad for him. I made a deal with myself: I was like, 'I'm not gonna get weird about what the future might be. I'm just going to be in every moment I can and enjoy us to the fullest.' I told him that, too.

texto: I think everyone should take an acting class. It's like therapy because you get to learn a lot about yourself if it's the right teacher. You're putting yourself up there in front of people, and it takes a lot of the intimidation of everyday away.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Joelle Carter: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a educacao. O trecho “I think everyone should take an acting class. It's like therapy because you get to learn a lot ab…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que educacao, yourself, people pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de people e acting.
